options.name: --always-spawn
options.description: Always spawn a child process to execute the command

options.name: --no-install
options.description: Skip installation if a package is missing

name: --call
-c
options.description: Execute string as if inside `npm run-script`

name: --shell
-s
options.description: Shell to execute the command with, if any

options.name: --shell-auto-fallback
options.description: Generate shell code to use pnpx as the "command not found" fallback

options.name: --ignore-existing
options.description: Ignores existing binaries in $PATH, or in the localproject. This forces pnpx to do a temporary install and use the latest version

name: --quiet
-q
options.description: Suppress output from pnpx itself. Subcommands will not be affected

options.name: --npm
options.description: Npm binary to use for internal operations

name: --node-arg
-n
options.description: Extra node argument when calling a node binary
